1792450.name: Lolita Creator
1792450.description:
Want to create your own lolita? Now you can with the lolita creator! Choose from tons of cute outfits and hairstyles to create your cute lolita character!

Features


  • 7 Cute Dresses
  • 3 Pretty Hairstyles
  • 4 Beautiful Accessories (headbands and handheld accessories)
  • 8 Different facial expressions
  • Saving your character as a transparent .PNG image

The artist for this game, who is known as IKR, is the same artist who drew all the art for the game "Long Live the Queen" by Hanako Games.
1792450.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
